# cargo-public-api 0.51.0
pub mod archon_memory
pub mod archon_memory::access
pub enum archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
pub archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::Direct
pub archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::Direct::_server_handle: tokio::runtime::task::join::JoinHandle<()>
pub archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::Direct::graph: alloc::sync::Arc<archon_memory::graph::MemoryGraph>
pub archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::Remote(archon_memory::client::MemoryClient)
impl archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::graph(&self) -> core::option::Option<&alloc::sync::Arc<archon_memory::graph::MemoryGraph>>
impl archon_memory::access::MemoryTrait for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::clear_all(&self) -> core::result::Result<usize, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::create_relationship(&self, from_id: &str, to_id: &str, rel_type: archon_memory::types::RelType, context: core::option::Option<&str>, strength: f64) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::delete_memory(&self, id: &str) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::get_memory(&self, id: &str) -> core::result::Result<archon_memory::types::Memory, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::get_related_memories(&self, id: &str, depth: u32) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<archon_memory::types::Memory>, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::list_recent(&self, limit: usize) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<archon_memory::types::Memory>, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::memory_count(&self) -> core::result::Result<usize, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::recall_memories(&self, query: &str, limit: usize) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<archon_memory::types::Memory>, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::search_memories(&self, filter: &archon_memory::types::SearchFilter) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<archon_memory::types::Memory>, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::store_memory(&self, content: &str, title: &str, memory_type: archon_memory::types::MemoryType, importance: f64, tags: &[alloc::string::String], source_type: &str, project_path: &str) -> core::result::Result<alloc::string::String, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::update_importance(&self, id: &str, importance: f64) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub fn archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess::update_memory(&self, id: &str, content: core::option::Option<&str>, tags: core::option::Option<&[alloc::string::String]>) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>

impl core::marker::Send for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
impl core::marker::Sync for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
impl core::marker::Unpin for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for archon_memory::access::MemoryAccess

pub mod archon_memory::client
pub struct archon_memory::client::MemoryClient
impl archon_memory::client::MemoryClient
pub async fn archon_memory::client::MemoryClient::call(&self, method: &str, params: serde_json::value::Value) -> core::result::Result<serde_json::value::Value, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub async fn archon_memory::client::MemoryClient::connect(addr: core::net::socket_addr::SocketAddr) -> core::result::Result<Self, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
pub async fn archon_memory::client::MemoryClient::ping(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
impl archon_memory::access::MemoryTrait for archon_memory::client::MemoryClient
pub fn archon_memory::client::MemoryClient::clear_all(&self) -> core::result::Result<usize, archon_memory::types::MemoryError>

pub archon_memory::embedding::EmbeddingProviderKind::Local
pub archon_memory::embedding::EmbeddingProviderKind::OpenAI

pub fn archon_memory::embedding::EmbeddingProvider::dimensions(&self) -> usize

pub mod archon_memory::extraction
pub struct archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory

pub archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory::memory_type: archon_memory::types::MemoryType
pub archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory::tags: alloc::vec::Vec<alloc::string::String>
impl core::clone::Clone for archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory
pub fn archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory::clone(&self) -> archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory

pub fn archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory::eq(&self, other: &archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for archon_memory::extraction::ExtractedMemory

pub mod archon_memory::graph
pub struct archon_memory::graph::MemoryGraph
impl archon_memory::graph::MemoryGraph

pub fn archon_memory::graph::MemoryGraph::create_relationship(&self, from_id: &str, to_id: &str, rel_type: archon_memory::types::RelType, context: core::option::Option<&str>, strength: f64) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>

pub mod archon_memory::types
pub enum archon_memory::types::MemoryError
pub archon_memory::types::MemoryError::Database(alloc::string::String)
pub archon_memory::types::MemoryError::Embedding(alloc::string::String)
pub archon_memory::types::MemoryError::InvalidRelType(alloc::string::String)
pub archon_memory::types::MemoryError::InvalidType(alloc::string::String)
pub archon_memory::types::MemoryError::Io(std::io::error::Error)

pub struct archon_memory::Memory
pub archon_memory::Memory::access_count: u64

pub fn archon_memory::MemoryTrait::create_relationship(&self, from_id: &str, to_id: &str, rel_type: archon_memory::types::RelType, context: core::option::Option<&str>, strength: f64) -> core::result::Result<(), archon_memory::types::MemoryError>
